title: Scrape: carancicreations.com (Wix)

accountCreationAndLogin.summary: There is NO standalone /login or /sign-up HTML page on this domain. Authentication is Wix Members, injected after JavaScript runs.

widget.behavior: Clicking 'Log In' opens Wix's members modal / flow (email, social, or sign-up), not a crawlable document.

howToCaptureLiveUrls: Open the live site in Chrome, click Log In, DevTools → Network, filter XHR/fetch for wix, users.wix.com, or members.
Use Wix dashboard → Settings → Members to see enabled login methods.
accountCreationAndLogin.nextAppNote: This repo adds /login and /signup as first-party pages with forms; wire them to Auth.js, Clerk, Supabase Auth, or similar — they are not copies of Wix's proprietary widget HTML.

visibleCopyFromHome.title: Caranci Creations - Local Photographer | Photography Services
visibleCopyFromHome.tagline: A high-end cinematic photography and videography studio dedicated to high-impact visual storytelling.
visibleCopyFromHome.headline: Caranci CREATIONS
visibleCopyFromHome.promo: Join Today! — Exclusive 20% off your First Purchase (via Log In / member flow on original site)

services.name: Cinematography
services.blurb: Professional high-end videography; cinematic storytelling for brand or creative projects.

services.name: Photography Jobs
services.blurb: Custom photos; top-of-the-line equipment; negotiable pricing.

rawHtmlDump: Optional: save a Thunderbolt HTML snapshot as _scrape_home.html for grep; the repo ignores _scrape*.html via .gitignore — do not commit large dumps.
